svg.text: Klonoa: Empire of Dreams — Program Flow

g.text: DMA clear IWRAM / VRAM / OAM / Palettes
OAM DMA • BG scroll registers • Palette DMA • Level-specific tile DMA
XOR REG_KEYINPUT • edge detection • A+B+Start+Select reset check
Decrement scene timer • Dispatch via ROM_STATE_TABLE (0x080D9150)
Advance vision counter when timer expires • Directional input acceleration

svg.text: Return to Main Loop (fade in + new scene callbacks)
The central dispatch table — function pointers that define the current scene's behavior
gPauseFlag — blocks all updates during transitions
